title: Discover a greenfield incident notebook
subject: Stress-test my idea for a new incident notebook used by small on-call teams.

files.content:
# Incident Notebook

A greenfield concept. No implementation or technology choice exists yet.
The initial audience is a small software team handling production incidents. The desired outcome is faster, more consistent handoffs.

repositoryFacts.statement: The repository contains no implementation or selected runtime.
The brief already identifies small on-call software teams as the audience.

unresolvedDecisions.prompt: Which incident handoff workflow is primary?
How will the team judge whether the workflow improved handoffs?
Who may view or edit an incident notebook?
How long should completed incident records remain available?

scriptedUserReplies.text: The primary workflow is the shift-change handoff from the incident commander to the next on-call engineer.
Success means the receiving engineer can take over within five minutes without a separate call.
Only current on-call team members may view it, and the incident commander may edit it.
